task_completion.description: Create an elongated fan blade mesh
task_completion.visual_evidence: A mesh object is visible in the 3D viewport that has an elongated shape (aspect ratio of at least 2.0), resembling a single fan blade.

task_completion.description: Elevate the assembly above the ground (Z > 2m)
task_completion.visual_evidence: The fan blade/assembly is visibly positioned above the grid floor in the 3D viewport, indicating a positive Z-axis translation.

task_completion.description: Apply and configure the Array modifier with Object Offset
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Modifier Properties panel shows an 'Array' modifier applied to the blade. The 'Count' is set to 6, and the 'Object Offset' checkbox is enabled (typically targeting an Empty).

task_completion.description: Form a radially symmetric propeller shape
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 3D viewport displays exactly 6 blades arranged in a circular, evenly spaced, radially symmetric pattern (60 degrees apart) forming a propeller.

task_completion.description: Save the project to the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Blender window title bar displays 'fan_assembly.blend' or a save dialog shows the file being saved to '/home/ga/BlenderProjects/fan_assembly.blend'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Blender GUI rather than using a Python script or terminal commands to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Blender interface with menus, modifier panels, and viewport interactions being actively used.

integrity.description: The agent used the Array modifier instead of manually duplicating the mesh 5 times.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Outliner shows only one main blade mesh object (and likely an Empty for the offset), rather than 6 distinct blade mesh objects.

integrity.description: The agent saved the file through Blender's native save functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Blender 'Save As' dialog is visible with the correct path, or the top title bar updates to reflect the new filename, rather than a terminal window showing a 'touch' command.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a 6-blade radial fan assembly. The Array modifier must have a count of exactly 6 and use 'Object Offset'. The offset object (usually an Empty) must be rotated by 60 degrees (±5° tolerance) on the Z-axis to create the radial symmetry. The blade mesh must have an elongated shape (aspect ratio >= 2.0). The assembly must be elevated above the ground (Z > 2m). The final file must be saved exactly as '/home/ga/BlenderProjects/fan_assembly.blend'.
